What I Do

What clients typically call me to do:

I focus on three things — bringing in the right traffic, making sure your site converts, and tracking every lead.

01

Google Ads Management

High-intent search campaigns with tight keyword targeting, compelling ad copy, and weekly optimizations. I manage Exact, Phrase, and Negative keywords to maximize ROI and lower your cost per lead.

Search CampaignsKeyword IntentBid StrategyROAS
View Projects →
02

Website Creation

I build clean, conversion-focused websites from scratch — designed to look great, load fast, and turn visitors into leads. From layout to launch, I handle the full build so you get a site that actually works for your business.

Web DesignResponsive BuildSEOConversion Focused
View Projects →
03

Landing Pages & Tracking

Landing pages built for one goal: turning traffic into booked calls. Then I install GA4, GHL, pixels, and call/form tracking so every lead is attributed — followed by weekly reporting.

Landing PagesGA4 SetupConversion TrackingReports
View Projects →

You'll know exactly what's working, what's not, and how to scale — with real data behind every decision.

Selected Work

Real projects, real results.

A mix of client work and coursework that shows how I think and execute.

brewersweet.com / email-list
Completed

Brewer Sweet — Email List Page

Designed and built a dedicated email list landing page for Brewer Sweet focused on capturing leads and growing their subscriber base. Created conversion-focused copy, a clean opt-in form layout, and mobile-first design to maximize sign-ups.

  • Custom landing page built for email list opt-ins
  • Conversion-focused layout with clear CTA hierarchy
  • Mobile-responsive design for maximum accessibility
  • Integrated with email marketing platform for list capture
Web DesignLanding PagesEmail MarketingCRO
google-ads-results-cas.vercel.app
Completed

College of Arts & Sciences — Google Ads

Ran a 3-round Google Ads simulation for USD's College of Arts & Sciences, targeting prospective students across the US. Iterated on keyword strategy each round — moving from broad reach to major-specific targeting to a balanced approach — driving a 19.7% CTR jump and hitting a campaign-low $0.44 CPC.

  • 2,893 total clicks & 44K impressions across 3 campaign rounds
  • CTR grew from 6.00% → 7.18% through major-specific keyword refinement
  • CPC dropped to $0.44 in Round 3 — campaign-best efficiency
  • Geo-targeted: San Diego (47.6%), LA (19%), NYC (14.3%) & more
Google AdsKeyword StrategyGeo-TargetingAd CopywritingCampaign Optimization

USD Coursework

Marketing coursework from USD's Knauss School of Business. Built a master content calendar for a simulation internship course, planning and scheduling social media posts across platforms with a full posting cadence, themes, and KPIs. Also includes keyword research, a full business plan, and the USD Fowler Business Challenge.

About Me

From the court to the campaign.

I played basketball all through high school and at Irvine Valley College. When I stopped playing, I channeled that same competitiveness into work — selling jewelry and flipping watches at 18, basketball training, and working at my favorite surf shop in Laguna Beach.

I took a break and went to Thailand with money I'd saved. Being around entrepreneurs pushed me toward marketing and consulting. Since then, I've been studying and practicing every day — determined to build a strong agency offering advertising services for brands and service-based businesses.
